authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(164) — Walker River, East Fork, from Bridgeport Dam to Nevada State Line
sources.quotedText: (164) Walker River, East Fork (Mono Co.) from Bridgeport Dam to Nevada State Line. Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15. Only artificial lures may be used. Minimum size limit: 18 inches total length. 2 trout NOTE: BOW AND ARROW FISHING FOR CARP ONLY IS PERMITTED.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General Provisions for waters listed in the special-regulations table
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: East Walker River | Fishing | Visit Mono County
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 859636, "East Walker River", Stream, Mono Co. CA / Lyon Co. NV
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":859636,"gaz_name":"East Walker River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"NV","county_name":"Mono"/"Lyon"}. This GNIS stream record files the whole East Walker River under state_alpha=NV because most of its named course (down to the confluence with the West Walker River near Yerington) lies in Nevada; of its 9 digitized vertices, only the southernmost (Web Mercator -13278826.20, 4607077.65 -> 38.19548 N, 119.28573 W) falls in California, south of Bridgeport Dam — so that vertex is not representative of the CA-regulated reach and is not used as water.lon/lat here (see usgs_nwis_10290200).

sources.title: USGS NWIS gauge 10290200, "E WALKER R A BRIDGEPORT CA" (Mono Co., CA) — station location used for water.lon/lat, coincident with the Bridgeport Dam start point of the regulated reach
sources.quotedText: USGS-CA,USGS California Water Science Center,USGS-10290200,E WALKER R A BRIDGEPORT CA,Stream,,16050301,159,sq mi,,,38.25825265000000,-119.2259875000000,24000,1,seconds,Interpolated from MAP.,NAD83

regulations.humanSummary: Open last Saturday in April through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used.

regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.note: Minimum size limit: 18 inches total length.

regulations.verbatimText: Minimum size limit: 18 inches total length.

parameters.counting_rule: The table entry sets a 2-trout daily bag limit (only trout 18 inches or longer may be kept); per 14 CCR 7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit also equals 2.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.description: Bow and arrow fishing (archery) for common carp only is permitted on this reach, notwithstanding the general artificial-lures-only gear restriction that applies to trout.

raw.note: BOW AND ARROW FISHING FOR CARP ONLY IS PERMITTED.

regulations.humanSummary: Bow and arrow fishing is permitted, but only for carp
regulations.verbatimText: NOTE: BOW AND ARROW FISHING FOR CARP ONLY IS PERMITTED.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
